name: cloudflare-auth-kit
description: One-click, fully self-hosted user management on Cloudflare — Better Auth backend + hosted login page + Better Auth Studio admin dashboard. Free and open source.
author: democra-ai

scripts.db:create: wrangler d1 create auth-kit-db && wrangler kv namespace create KV

DB.description: D1 database that stores users, accounts, and organizations.

KV.description: KV namespace that stores login sessions.

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: 32+ random characters used to sign sessions. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 33

AUTH_URL.description: The public URL of this Worker, e.g. https://auth.yourdomain.com (set after you add a custom domain; defaults to the workers.dev URL).

ADMIN_EMAILS.description: Comma-separated emails allowed into the admin dashboard (any user with role=admin also gets in).
